dataset: ekylibre_env (GAEC JOULIN farm, Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France)

pi_items.source: Task description states: 'record a total cost of 245.50 EUR'
Task description uses EUR as currency; Ekylibre setup confirms GAEC JOULIN is a French farm operating in Euros
Task description states 'set the nature to Repair or Maintenance'. Keywords verified: repair/réparation (French/English for repair), maintenance/entretien (French/English for maintenance)

Task description requires: 'Remplacement rétroviseur et flexible hydraulique'. Keywords verified through French agricultural equipment suppliers: rétroviseur=tractor mirror, flexible hydraulique=hydraulic hose. mirror and hose are English equivalents.

Task specifies 'Select a tractor (e.g., Massey Ferguson)'. Verified: tracteur/tractor (French/English for tractor), massey (Massey Ferguson - tractor brand), fendt (Fendt - German tractor manufacturer), deere (John Deere - American tractor manufacturer), claas (CLAAS - German agricultural equipment manufacturer)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Ekylibre farm management system initialized with real farm data from GAEC JOULIN (Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France), sourced from the official ekylibre/first_run-demo public GitHub repository. All metadata specifications are accurate: the intervention cost is 245.50 EUR, nature keywords (repair/réparation, maintenance/entretien) are valid Ekylibre intervention types, the description keywords (rétroviseur/mirror, flexible/hose) match the required French task description about replacing a tractor mirror and hydraulic hose, and the equipment keywords correctly identify major tractor manufacturers (Massey Ferguson, Fendt, John Deere, CLAAS) suitable for the GAEC JOULIN farm context.
